content: Create Epic for MMS UI Completion & E2E Testing
Create Phase 1 beads: Playwright E2E Testing Infrastructure (2 stories)
Create Phase 2 beads: E2E Tests for Completed Features (6 stories)
Create Phase 3 beads: Canvas Features Completion (5 stories)
Create Phase 4 beads: UI Components Completion (6 stories)
Create Phase 5 beads: Explanation Panels (3 stories)
Create Phase 6 beads: Accessibility Compliance (1 story)
Create Phase 7 beads: Inventory Integration (3 stories)
